column14: Cableway had no tagmarks, and I did not expect that. I used black duct tape this time, but will have to redo on another visit with enamel paint.  Cablecar is well below platform. With 100lb weight and me, it was about 30cm below platform.  Without any weight, it is a 5cm below platform.  Trimble and A-reel have been working amzingly the last few months!!!
